title: Release investment fear, allow great deals
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for when fear of the wrong deal is louder than openness to the right one.
excerpt: A short energy statement from the MONEY program. The release works with fear of hidden problems and poor timing; the allow opens to outstanding deals arriving with ease.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 47 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when fear of the wrong investment decision is stopping you from taking the next concrete step.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 47 of the MONEY program. For when the fear of a hidden problem or bad timing has become a reason to stay still rather than research and decide.
I am ready to release all fear around investment — fear of hidden problems, poor timing, and not being good enough at this. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow outstanding, lucrative investment opportunities to arrive with ease. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 47 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
